title: stop resource max_steps max_cost lease_expired
purpose: A4.3 defines stop resource max steps max cost lease expired for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified.
scope: Owns `A4.3` only; siblings under `A4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §3 — Branch A — Pursuit & control plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#3-branch-a-pursuit-control-plane).
behavior_steps: Each pursuit wake increments budget counters from [A1.4](A1.4-deadline-budget-steps-tokens-wall-clock.md)—session steps, goal steps, token spend, cost accrual, and runner lease timestamps—before [A2.2](A2.2-if-ready-execute-one-pipeline-step.md) schedules another phase.

When any configured ceiling is reached, [A2.1](A2.1-preflight-check-pipeline-blocked-extended.md) emits stop class `resource:max_steps`, `resource:max_cost`, or `resource:lease_expired` and exits [A2.6](A2.6-loop-until-blocked-budget-achieved-h3-reject.md) without advancing `next_action`.

Journal-keeper dual-writes the exhausted budget dimension, current counter values, and stop reason to journal and state.json so operators and Plane D schedulers can audit why pursuit halted—not a silent session end.

Operators may extend budgets at H2 when policy allows; [D3.2](D3.2-priority-boost-queue-depth-threshold.md) may reprioritize sibling work when a shared runner lease expires, but the stop record remains until explicitly cleared.
If budget fields are missing or counters disagree with ledger evidence, preflight fails closed at H2 rather than allowing unbounded always-on pursuit.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
goal_verify passes but H3 rejected â€” goal.state returns to pursuing with rejection notes.
Edge case `A4.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `A4.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Add `goal` block to state template and journal-keeper dual-write (v2.14).
Implement `scripts/goal-verify.py` stub aggregating task evidence paths.
Document `A4.3` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `A4.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: A4.3 defines stop resource max steps max cost lease expired for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified. In practice, the system each pursuit wake increments budget counters from [a1.4](a1.4-deadline-budget-steps-tokens-wall-clock.md)—session steps, goal steps, token spend, cost accrual, and runner lease timestamps—before [a2.2](a2.2-if-ready-execute-one-pipeline-step.md) schedules another phase, then when any configured ceiling is reached, [a2.1](a2.1-preflight-check-pipeline-blocked-extended.md) emits stop class `resource:max_steps`, `resource:max_cost`, or `resource:lease_expired` and exits [a2.6](a2.6-loop-until-blocked-budget-achieved-h3-reject.md) without advancing `next_action`.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-a 2026-06-28 -->

Resource stops bound autonomous pursuit in measurable units: max steps per session or goal, token budgets, cost caps, and lease expiry on shared runners. When a budget is exhausted, pursuit halts with a stop reason that operators can extend at H2 if policy allows.

These limits implement [A1.4](A1.4-deadline-budget-steps-tokens-wall-clock.md) in the stop taxonomy so “always-on” never means “unbounded.” Scheduling in Plane D may reprioritize work when leases expire, but the stop record must remain auditable. Too-tight budgets cause false stops; too-loose budgets waste spend—pack authors set defaults per goal_type.
